declarations.description:
Accessible image zoom web component. Wraps an ``, `` / non-`
`, ``) must have a CSS `background-image` — that's where the modal pulls its source from. A bare `
` with no background-image is silently non-zoomable because there's nothing to render in the modal.
declarations.name: ImageZoomElement

cssProperties.description: Background color of the built-in zoom trigger button.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-btn-bg

cssProperties.description: Foreground color of the built-in zoom trigger button.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-btn-color

cssProperties.description: Background color of the modal's unzoom button.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-btn-unzoom-bg

cssProperties.description: Foreground color of the modal's unzoom button.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-btn-unzoom-color

cssProperties.description: Starting/ending modal overlay color used for fade-in/out.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-overlay-bg-hidden

cssProperties.description: Duration of the overlay fade and image zoom transitions.
cssProperties.name: --rmiz-transition-duration

cssParts.description: Invisible overlay positioned over the source image that hosts the default trigger button.
cssParts.name: ghost

cssParts.description: The icon inside the built-in zoom button.
cssParts.name: btn-zoom-icon

cssParts.description: The opaque fade-in overlay inside the dialog.
cssParts.name: modal-overlay

cssParts.description: The positioning wrapper inside the overlay.
cssParts.name: modal-content

cssParts.description: The fallback modal close button (shadow DOM).
cssParts.name: btn-unzoom

cssParts.description: The icon inside the built-in unzoom button.
cssParts.name: btn-unzoom-icon

slots.description: Default slot for the source image or scalable element.

Optional override for the built-in zoom trigger button. Provide a focusable element (e.g. `<button slot="trigger">…</button>`) to replace the default. The fallback button stays for a11y when this slot is empty.
slots.name: trigger

slots.description: Optional override for the modal content (the part shown when the image is zoomed). The consumer's slotted content replaces the default ``. Put `[data-rmiz-modal-img]` on the element that should receive the zoom transform.
slots.name: modal

slots.description: Optional override for the modal's close button.
slots.name: modal-button

members.name: btnUnzoom
members.description:
The active unzoom button inside the modal dialog. Exposed so
consumers can replace its icon/label or portal framework content
into it. Always available after construction — the dialog and its
default button live in the shadow DOM from construction time. If
the consumer provides a `slot="modal-button"` override, this returns
that slotted element instead of the shadow fallback.

events.name: image-zoom:state-change
events.description: Fires on every transition of the internal modal state machine (`UNLOADED` → `LOADING` → `LOADED` → `UNLOADING` → `UNLOADED`).

events.name: image-zoom:error
events.description: Fires when the source image or optional zoom image fails to load.
Cancelable. Fires when the user initiates a zoom or unzoom. Call `event.preventDefault()` to enter controlled mode and manage the `zoomed` attribute yourself.
events.name: image-zoom:zoom-change

events.description: Fires when the active unzoom button changes (e.g. because a consumer dynamically assigned `slot="modal-button"`). Framework wrappers caching the `btnUnzoom` getter should re-read it on this event to keep portals targeted at the correct element.
events.name: image-zoom:btn-unzoom-change

attributes.name: zoomed
attributes.description: Controls whether the modal is open. Toggling dispatches `image-zoom:zoom-change`; callers can `preventDefault` it to implement controlled mode.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: When set, clicks on the image are a no-op and bubble normally to parent handlers.

attributes.name: zoom-margin
attributes.description: Pixel offset reserved around the zoomed image inside the viewport. Defaults to `0`.

attributes.name: zoom-src
attributes.description: Optional higher-resolution image URL loaded lazily when the user zooms in.

attributes.name: zoom-srcset
attributes.description: `srcset` for the zoom image (mirrors the `` attribute).

attributes.name: label-zoom
attributes.description: Accessible label for the built-in zoom trigger button. Appended with the source image's `alt` when present. Defaults to `"Expand image"`.

attributes.name: label-unzoom
attributes.description: Accessible label for the modal's close button. Defaults to `"Minimize image"`.

attributes.name: can-swipe-to-unzoom
attributes.description: When `false`, disables the swipe-down-to-close gesture on touch devices. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: swipe-to-unzoom-threshold
attributes.description: Pixel threshold for the swipe-to-close gesture. Defaults to `10`.

declarations.summary: Accessible medium.com-style image zoom as a framework-agnostic web component.
